Class CategoryGift

java.lang.Object
discount.Discount
discount.CategoryDiscount
discount.CategoryGift
All Implemented Interfaces:
GiftDiscount
public class CategoryGift extends CategoryDiscount implements GiftDiscount
It implements the Category discount whose type is Gift

  • Constructor Details

    • CategoryGift

      public CategoryGift(String assignedId, LocalDateTime assignedStartDate, LocalDateTime assignedEndDate, double assignedSpendingThreshold, StoreProduct assignedGift, Category... assignedCategories) throws NullPointerException, IllegalArgumentException
      A gift discount's general constructor with categories
      Parameters:
      assignedId - the discount's id
      assignedStartDate - the date when the discount starts
      assignedEndDate - the date when the discount ends
      assignedSpendingThreshold - the spending threshold that allows the discount to take place
      assignedGift - the product gifted to the client when a certain spending threshold is met
      assignedCategories - the discount's categories
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - the null pointer exception
      IllegalArgumentException - the illegal argument exception

    • CategoryGift

      public CategoryGift(LocalDateTime assignedStartDate, LocalDateTime assignedEndDate, double assignedSpendingThreshold, StoreProduct assignedGift, Category... assignedCategories) throws NullPointerException, IllegalArgumentException
      Instantiates a new gift discount with categories
      Parameters:
      assignedStartDate - the date when the discount starts
      assignedEndDate - the date when the discount ends
      assignedSpendingThreshold - the spending threshold that allows the discount to take place
      assignedGift - the product gifted to the client when a certain spending threshold is met
      assignedCategories - the discount's categories
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - the null pointer exception
      IllegalArgumentException - the illegal argument exception

      Throws:

    • setSpendingThreshold

      public void setSpendingThreshold(double assignedSpendingThreshold) throws IllegalArgumentException
      It allows the manager to change the gift discount's spending threshold
      Specified by:
      setSpendingThreshold in interface GiftDiscount
      Parameters:
      assignedSpendingThreshold - the new spending threshold
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - the spending threshold must be greater than 0
